text:
"Famously..." is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 15 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 2 and track 8 in the album Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo Original Soundtrack, with the latter as a shorter version with no lyrics. It was also used in the film Shin Godzilla much like in Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo Original Soundtrack. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

Lyrics

 
Famously...

Famously, to the depths of despair, I have been sent.
No one was saved, and to their graves, perished and dead.
All on my head.
Because of me.

Those I have failed feel my betrayal.
The final nail, hammered by me. 
I didn't mean what is done.
If I could turn back the time now, I'd sacrifice my own life for him.
Why not me?
